title: peirao #3987
definition:
1) to make a trial of, to attempt
    1a) taught by trial, experienced
 2) to test, to make trial of one, put him to proof
    2a) his mind, sentiments, temper
    2b) in particular, to attempt to induce one to commit some
        (esp. carnal) crime
    2c) tempted to sin
